published_prior_art.cite: DingLu2017/JiangYangDing2022: principal-score PI identifies principal causal effects under principal ignorability
NguyenStuartScharfsteinOgburn2024: binary two-stratum PI-violation sensitivity; DornGuoKallus2022: sharp bounded-odds ATE sensitivity

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_ordinal_late_partial_defiers: Conjecture 1 gives an ordinal adjacent-pair versus global compatibility gap for response paths

published_prior_art.cite: WuAntonelli2024/TongKahanHarhayLi2025 are closest but do not subsume a K>=3 adjacent posterior-chain sharp LP

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The binary-dichotomization gap does not name a published ordinal principal-stratification workflow that actually intersects, unions, or Bonferroni-combines adjacent binary sensitivity intervals; tier=letter below novelty_target=field unless a real target is cited.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The Gamma=1 collapse silently needs positive principal-score support connected in each observed cell; with an interior zero weight, the adjacent-ratio constraints can disconnect positive strata and q need not equal w pointwise.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The comparator 'all adjacent binary splits and then intersects, unions, or Bonferroni-combines' is not a pinned mathematical procedure, so the strict-gap clause is too broad to verify.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add an explicit full-support or connected-positive-support assumption for all A_z(k) cells, or weaken Theorem 1 to the connected components actually pinned by Gamma=1.
Replace the vague binary-shortcut comparator with a formal relaxation B_bin(P,Gamma) and prove strict containment against that named object.
Name a concrete published ordinal/intercurrent-event analysis that dichotomizes or stitches binary principal-stratum sensitivity analyses, and quote the relevant workflow claim.

Differentiate the conjecture from pid_ordinal_late_partial_defiers by stating the new posterior-calibration feature that cannot be reduced to the existing ordinal global-versus-pairwise compatibility template.

recommended_next_step: Revise the conjecture comparator and support assumptions, then rerun novelty review with a named published dichotomization target.
